cost.hint: The type of special and what is required to activate it

mandatory.label: Mandatory?
mandatory.hint: If checked, this special must be used when triggered

flashbackUsed.label: Flashback Used
flashbackUsed.hint: Whether the character has used their once-per-session flashback

fallenMode.hint: Whether this character has died and become a Fallen

customization.hint: Describe what this looks/sounds like for your character

npcType.label: NPC Type
npcType.hint: The category of NPC (Paragon, Echo, Fallen, The Fair, or Creature)

paragonSubtype.label: Paragon Class
paragonSubtype.hint: Which paragon class this NPC represents

paragonPowerLevel.label: Power Level
paragonPowerLevel.hint: The strength tier of this paragon NPC

echoLevel.label: Echo Level
echoLevel.hint: How complete is this echo's connection to the Persona

fallenSubtype.label: Fallen Type
fallenSubtype.hint: The strength tier of this Fallen entity

description.label: Description
description.hint: General NPC description and flavor text

specials.label: NPC Specials
specials.hint: Always-available special abilities for this NPC

specials.label: Ability Specials
specials.hint: Special effects that trigger when rolling 6s

NPC.FairNote: The Fair do not use traditional stats. Use coin flips for all rolls instead of dice pools. They always appear in pairs and have Defence 3.

specials.label: Specials
specials.hint: Special abilities that trigger when rolling 6+ on dice

title.label: Title
title.hint: e.g., God of War, Goddess of the Moon

upgrades.label: Upgrades
upgrades.hint: Upgrades can be picked multiple times

emotionSubtype.label: Emotion Type
emotionSubtype.hint: The specific emotion for this stance (EMOTION stances only)

specials.label: Specials
specials.hint: Special abilities that trigger when rolling 6+ on dice

weaponType.label: Weapon Type
weaponType.hint: Type of weapon (e.g., Sword, Bow, Staff, Spear)

personality.label: Personality
personality.hint: The weapon's personality (e.g., Aggressive, Cautious, Playful, Wise)

coreNature.label: Core Nature
coreNature.hint: The fundamental nature and philosophy of this paragon

die.label: Class Die
die.hint: The die type used for this paragon's class die

importantStat.label: Important Stat
importantStat.hint: The primary stat for this paragon

looks.label: Looks
looks.hint: Appearance and clothing options for this paragon

specials.label: Specials
specials.hint: Special abilities that trigger when rolling 6+ on dice

cost.label: Cost (6+s)
cost.hint: How many 6+ results are needed to activate

mandatory.label: Mandatory?
mandatory.hint: If checked, this special must be used when triggered

classAbilities.label: Class Abilities Form Definition
classAbilities.hint: Defines the form fields that appear on the character's Paragon tab

specialKey.label: Special Key (for special field)
specialKey.hint: References a special in the specials array

fields.label: Nested Fields (for group)
fields.hint: Array of field definitions for grouped fields

advancementForms.label: Advancement Forms Definition
advancementForms.hint: Defines the form fields that appear on the character's Advancements tab

classDiceImage.label: Class Dice Image
classDiceImage.hint: Optional image to replace the class dice icon in character sheet header. Recommended: 50x50px square, transparent background, PNG or SVG.

portraitImage.label: Default Portrait Image
portraitImage.hint: Optional default portrait for character sidebar. Only shown if player hasn't set a custom portrait. Recommended: 300x300px or larger, portrait orientation, JPG or PNG.

tokenImage.label: Default Token Image
tokenImage.hint: Optional default token image. Only shown if player hasn't set a custom token. If not set, uses the portrait image. Recommended: 256x256px or larger, square, transparent background, PNG.

equipmentOptions.label: Starting Equipment Options
equipmentOptions.hint: Equipment items characters can select when choosing this paragon

ClassAbilities.Description: These fields appear on the character's Class tab. Define the form structure as a JSON array.
ClassAbilities.SeeReference: See Field Type Reference below for all available types and required properties.

AdvancementForms.Description: These fields appear on the character's Advancements tab below the advancement map.
AdvancementForms.SameAsClassAbilities: Uses the same field types as Class Abilities. See reference above for examples.

AdvancementPool.Description: Define the unique advancements available for this paragon. Each advancement needs a unique id (number) and name.

AdvancementAssignments.Description: Map each position on the advancement map to an advancement ID from the pool above. The same advancement can appear in multiple positions.
AdvancementAssignments.PositionReferenceDesc: The advancement map has 19 assignable positions (row0-1 is the START node and not assigned). Use these position IDs as keys, with advancement IDs (from the pool above) as values.

FieldReference.AvailableTypesList: text, number, boolean, select, multiSelect, html, info, itemList, group, special
FieldReference.OptionalPropertiesList: initial, choices, min, max, itemType, specialKey, fields, hint, description (HTML)

ValidationTip.TipText: Use a JSON validator (like jsonlint.com) if you encounter errors. The form will show validation errors on save if the JSON is malformed.

FallenMode.TooltipReturnToLiving: Click to return to Living mode
FallenMode.Title: You Are Fallen
FallenMode.Description: You are an undead monster. If you kill one of the other player characters, you become alive again.

UnlifeRules.Title: Unlife After Death
UnlifeRules.LostAbilities: You lose access to any special abilities granted by your class, but keep your stats and equipment.
UnlifeRules.Resurrection: If you provide the killing Wound to another Persona-controlled character, you immediately come to life and regain all your class abilities.
UnlifeRules.VoteDoesNotCount: Your vote to go home no longer counts, because you're dead.

FallenClaws.Title: Fallen Claws
FallenClaws.Description: While your old weaponry might look the same, it's changed. Many Fallen abandon the pretence, lose their weapons, and attack with claws sprouting from their body.
FallenClaws.PoisonEffect: All attacks you make gain Special: if this attack causes a Wound the target is poisoned. (Lose 1 Health per round until a character succeeds a Constitution test.)

SecondDeath.Title: Second Death?
SecondDeath.Description: You're dead. At least the worst has happened, right? If you die again, you will rise again at the end of the encounter. You have a nagging feeling there are only so many times this can happen before you lose something fundamental. (You're right.)

MonstrousAbilities.Title: Monstrous Abilities
MonstrousAbilities.AddSpecialTooltip: Add a special to this ability
MonstrousAbilities.NoSpecials: No specials defined for this ability
MonstrousAbilities.NoAbilities: No monstrous abilities. Click 'Add Ability' to create one.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: You are able to soar through the sky at a sprinting pace.
Flight.customizationPrompt:
Decide what this looks like:

  • Wings
  • Thrusters
  • Enormous blood-coated springs
  • Something else

Intangibility.name: Intangibility
Intangibility.description: You are able to move spectrally through objects that bar your path. (This gives you no specific bonus to resist damage.)
Intangibility.customizationPrompt:
Decide what this looks like:

  • Classic spectral
  • A burst of digital noise
  • Transformation into burrowing worms
  • Something else

UncannyScenes.name: Uncanny Senses
UncannyScenes.description: You can perceive things far beyond normal human capabilities.
UncannyScenes.customizationPrompt:
Decide which type of thing you can sense:

  • Strong emotions
  • Heartbeats and breathing
  • Narrative
  • Something else

SizeChanging.name: Size Changing
SizeChanging.description: You can swell to four times your height or shrink to a tenth of your size.
SizeChanging.customizationPrompt:
Decide what this looks and/or sounds like:

  • Cracking gristle and bone
  • Folding and unfolding fractal limbs
  • An incongruous slide-whistle
  • Something else

ShapeChanging.name: Shape Changing
ShapeChanging.description: You can change your form to appear to be something else... until you attack.
ShapeChanging.customizationPrompt:
Decide what your tell is, no matter your form:

  • Your voice remains an awful undead crackle
  • You smell like the rotting flesh you are
  • All animals view you with fear and suspicion
  • Something else

enableFailingForward.name: Enable Failing Forward
enableFailingForward.hint: If enabled, rolls with 0 final successes but >0 initial successes will succeed with a cost or complication (as per optional rule).

enableCriticalFail.name: Enable Critical Fail Display
enableCriticalFail.hint: If enabled, rolls with 0 successes and at least one 1 will display as a Critical Fail with special styling.

enableDiceInteraction.name: Enable Interactive Dice
enableDiceInteraction.hint: Allows clicking success dice in chat messages to change which dice appear crossed out by difficulty. This is visual only - the final success count is always based on difficulty.

fallenGameMode.name: Fallen Game Mode
fallenGameMode.hint: Choose how Fallen characters work. Rituals mode: Fallen lose all paragon powers immediately (best for one-shots). Campaign mode: Fallen keep all paragon powers until second death (best for longer campaigns).

Results.FailForwardNote: Action succeeds with cost or complication - GM narrates.

Dialog.UseFlashback: Use a flashback to get 1 advantage? (once per session)
Dialog.ClassDieDescription: Some class abilities allow players to add their class die to thepool as well
Dialog.ZeroPoolWarning: The dice pool is 0, the system will roll two dice and pick the lowest

SetDifficulty.AttackHint: For attacks, Difficulty is equal to the target's Defense.

Success.FallenModeEnabled: Character has fallen. They are now undead.

Info.PartialSaveOtherFieldsSaved: Your other changes have been saved. Please fix the JSON and save again.
Info.DiceInteractionComingSoon: Dice interaction is not yet enabled. Coming soon!

Warning.NoPermissionToModifyRoll: You do not have permission to modify this roll.
Warning.CanOnlyCrossOutSuccessDice: You can only cross out success dice (4+).

Hints.LooksDescription: Appearance/clothing options that characters can choose from.
Hints.SpecialsDescription: Special abilities that can be activated when rolling 6+ on dice.
Hints.ScripturesDescription: Scriptures are the benefits granted by this god. Typically 3, but more can be added.
Hints.UpgradesDescription: Upgrades can be picked multiple times. Only one upgrade marked Defensive unless an advancement says otherwise.
Hints.ThemeImagesHint: Customize how this paragon appears on character sheets with optional default images.
Hints.DragEquipmentHere: Drag equipment items here from compendiums to add them as starting options.
Hints.SelectStartingEquipment: Select and add equipment from your paragon's options.
